name: Oriental Mini Meat Loaves with Honey Garlic S
recipeIngredient: 1 can Water chestnuts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
SAUCE: Combine 1/3 cup honey, 1/2 cup ketchup, 2 tbsp soya sauce and 1/2 tsp garlic powder. Cook in small saucepan until hot and bubbly.
Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Mix lightly to blend. Grease 12 muffin cups and fill with mixture. Press down firmly in each cup. Bake for 35-40 minutes at 350°F. Serve with honey garlic sauce.
